description:
You are a Desktop Publisher at a ship management company. Your task is to catalog the vessel fleet available in the Bridge Command simulator and create a technical reference manual, a data index, and a demonstration scenario. Extract technical parameters (Model Name, MaxSpeed, Length, Beam, and Draft) from the configuration files located in the subdirectories of /opt/bridgecommand/Models/.

Create a Fleet Technical Manual at /home/ga/Documents/fleet_technical_manual.txt featuring a 'Fleet Technical Manual' header with today's date, detailed entries for each discovered model, and a summary line stating the total count of models cataloged. Produce a Model Index CSV at /home/ga/Documents/model_index.csv using the header ModelDirectory,DisplayName,MaxSpeed,Length,Beam,Draft, including rows for each model with raw values from their config files (use 'N/A' for missing values).

Develop a Fleet Review Scenario in a new directory at /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/z) Fleet Review/. The scenario must include an environment.ini configured for daytime (08:00-16:00) with good visibility (>=10nm) and calm weather (<=2.0), an ownship.ini using one of the cataloged models, and an othership.ini featuring at least 5 different traffic vessels with waypoint legs. Aim to catalog at least 8 distinct models.
